limitations: One easy, successful SWE-Verified task is not an independent-task sample.
Most post-tool concepts are explicit in the preceding transcript.
Minimum rank over synonyms and 32 layers creates multiple opportunities.
Readout association alone does not establish causal use by the model.

label: EXPLORATORY ONE-TASK ADAPTATION: method-aligned intermediate concept recovery, not a benchmark-level or causal result
